svg.title: Valkyrja exception hierarchy — Java
svg.desc: Java-specific naming convention and inheritance hierarchy for Valkyrja throwables and exceptions. ValkyrjaInvalidArgumentException extends java.lang.IllegalArgumentException for language-level catchability while preserving cross-port naming parity.
svg.text: All Valkyrja exceptions extend RuntimeException (unchecked) — no throws declarations required
shared across Http · Cli · Queue etc.
concrete · one per throw site or group
ValkyrjaInvalidArgumentException extends java.lang.IllegalArgumentException — parity name, language root preserved.
All Valkyrja exceptions extend RuntimeException — never checked Exception — so no throws declarations needed.
ComponentName* prefix resolves Spotless ambiguity warnings on same-named exceptions across packages.
Java abstract classes prevent direct instantiation at compile time — strongest enforcement across all ports.
Identical roots to Java. All exceptions unchecked by default. Java port maps 1:1 with no structural changes needed.
